_readme: Curated effect encodings. Only stated numbers; anything context-dependent is kind:unmodeled with a note. sourceText quotes the stated effect. provisional:true marks entries whose source vintage is not current-patch-verified (owned augment scrape). Keys: item:<slug> | eternal:<id>:major | eternal:<id>:<minor> | augment:<hero>:<catalog-id> (hero augments live in augments.json, same schema; ids join the pred.gg field evidence). Ability-scoped effects target kit slots (PRIMARY/SECONDARY/ALTERNATE/ULTIMATE), mapped from ability names at curation time. Conventions for augments: hit-conditional effects ("when it hits a Hero") are modeled because the sim already assumes casts hit; positioning/pickup/terrain conditions are unmodeled; "isolated"/"nearest enemy" amps are modeled because kill-window sims are 1v1 by construction; per-rank amp arrays use the mean (the damage parser convention); tick cadences fold into per-cast totals.

item:necrosis.name: Necrosis / Necro's Edge + Matter Disruptor
item:necrosis.sourceText: Gain 25 Ultimate Haste. Your Ultimate Ability deals 15% more damage.

item:nuclear-rounds.name: Nuclear Rounds / Havoc
item:nuclear-rounds.sourceText: Increase Ability Damage by 10-20%, based on Critical Strike Chance.

item:caustica.name: Caustica / Magus
item:caustica.sourceText: Ignore 35% of Magical Armor. (Arcane Might: conditional on target armor and health, unmodeled.)

effects.note: Arcane Might: +0.2% damage per point of target bonus Magical Armor while above 50% health

item:combustion.name: Combustion / Pyro
item:combustion.sourceText: On dealing Ability Damage (15s CD): deal 50 (+18% MP) magical damage to target and nearby enemies. Pyromaniac CD reduction unmodeled.

effects.note: Pyromaniac: damaging heroes reduces Pyro cooldown by 0.5s per hit

item:tainted-scepter.name: Tainted Scepter / Blighted Spells + Malice
item:tainted-scepter.sourceText: On magical damage: reduce target healing 45% for 4s. Malice: 15 stacks (1/s), ability hits deal 1.5 (+1% MP) per stack; encoded at full stacks (22.5 +15% MP) with 15s ramp.

item:tainted-rounds.name: Tainted Rounds / Blighted Strikes
item:tainted-rounds.sourceText: On basic attacks: reduce target healing 45% for 3s; deal (+10% AD) on-hit (second stated scaling has a stripped stat icon and the up-to-100% missing-health amp is execution-dependent: unmodeled).

effects.note: second on-hit scaling term (icon-ambiguous) and missing-health amplification up to +100%

item:tainted-guard.name: Tainted Guard / Blighted Thorns
item:tainted-guard.sourceText: On being hit by a basic attack: reduce source healing 45% for 3s; bleed 30 (+30%) over 3s (thorns are incoming-attack-dependent: unmodeled).

effects.note: Bleed thorns require incoming basic attacks; no incoming-attack model yet

item:sky-splitter.name: Sky Splitter / Rend
item:sky-splitter.sourceText: On-hit: 5.5% of target current health (3.5% for ranged heroes), minimum 12.

item:noxia.name: Noxia / Evil Eye + Dark Matter
item:noxia.sourceText: Mark on ability damage; hitting a marked hero with a separate ability (8s CD) deals 6% of target max health bonus damage. Requires a 2+ ability kit; encoded as an 8s-ICD ability proc.

item:deathstalker.name: Deathstalker / Virulent Strikes + Onslaught
item:deathstalker.sourceText: Basic attacks shred 3 physical armor for 3s, stacks 4x (12 flat, ~3s ramp). Onslaught: gain attack speed equal to 100% of Physical Penetration (PhysPen icon).

item:equinox.name: Equinox / Adamance
item:equinox.sourceText: On going below 40% health (90s CD): gain a 350-750 shield (by level) for 4s. Credited once per fight as flat EHP.

item:magnify.name: Magnify / Shredding Spells
item:magnify.sourceText: Ability hits reduce target magical armor 6% for 3.5s, stacks 5x (30% at full stacks; ramp depends on hit cadence, encoded 8s).

item:painweaver.name: Painweaver / Splice
item:painweaver.sourceText: On ability cast: +2 physical pen for 4s, stacks 4x (8 flat at full stacks; ramp depends on cast cadence, encoded 8s). Movement speed unmodeled.

item:scattershot.name: Scattershot / Scatter
item:scattershot.sourceText: On-hit: 2 homing projectiles, each (+30% AD), on-hit at 50% effectiveness; whether they can strike the original target is unverified.

effects.note: multi-target projectiles; single-target value unverified

item:lightning-hawk.name: Lightning Hawk / Chilling Momentum
item:lightning-hawk.sourceText: At 100 stacks of Momentum, empower your next Basic for 40 (+20%) and a slow.

effects.note: empowered basic procs every 100 Momentum stacks, but the stack-generation rate is unstated, so the proc cadence cannot be derived

eternal:vesh:major.name: Vesh (Major)
eternal:vesh:major.sourceText: Ability damage on heroes deals 6% (+0.5% per minute) of the damage as a DoT over 3s.

eternal:vesh:the-tenth-seal.name: Vesh / The Tenth Seal
eternal:vesh:the-tenth-seal.sourceText: At Level 10, gain 5% Ultimate Damage and 25 Ultimate Ability Haste.

eternal:vesh:mind-rot.name: Vesh / Mind Rot
eternal:vesh:mind-rot.sourceText: The major also deals 2% of the target's current health as bonus damage.

eternal:xyris:major.name: Xyris (Major)
eternal:xyris:major.sourceText: Gain 4% Bonus Damage, increased by 0.6% per 10 Units killed. Encoded at base; CS scaling needs match context.

effects.note: +0.6% per 10 units killed; needs CS-by-minute data (backlog item 2+)

eternal:xyris:eviscerate.name: Xyris / Eviscerate
eternal:xyris:eviscerate.sourceText: Deal +15% bonus damage to targets above 80% Health.

eternal:thraex:major.name: Thraex (Major)
eternal:thraex:major.sourceText: Mark last basic-attacked hero 3s: +3% (+0.5% per level) damage to them, they deal less to you. Credited in sustained windows only (mark requires an opening hit).

eternal:thraex:savage-strikes.name: Thraex / Savage Strikes
eternal:thraex:savage-strikes.sourceText: On-hit 1.5 (+0.4 per level) physical, +100% for 3s vs heroes (encoded at the vs-hero doubled value).

eternal:thraex:ferocity.name: Thraex / Ferocity
eternal:thraex:ferocity.sourceText: Gain 1.5% Total Attack Speed per 1s in Hero Combat, stacking infinitely.

eternal:vermis:major.name: Vermis (Major)
eternal:vermis:major.sourceText: Every 3rd consecutive basic on the same hero within 2.5s deals 3% (+0.25% per level) max health physical (credited 1/3 per hit, assumes maintained cadence).

eternal:vermis:melting-point.name: Vermis / Melting Point
eternal:vermis:melting-point.sourceText: Deal 10% bonus damage to targets with more than 125 Physical Armor.

eternal:krix:major.name: Krix (Major)
eternal:krix:major.sourceText: Gain 5% (+1% per Level) increased Maximum Health.

eternal:idrisil:major.name: Idrisil (Major)
eternal:idrisil:major.sourceText: While off cooldown and above 30% health: +15% Physical and Magical Armor (shield-on-break unmodeled).

effects.note: below-30% conversion to a 150%-of-armor shield, 75s+ CD

eternal:idrisil:diamond-tip.name: Idrisil / Diamond Tip
eternal:idrisil:diamond-tip.sourceText: Gain 4% increased Physical and Magical Penetration per finished item.

eternal:demiurge:major.name: Demiurge (Major)
eternal:demiurge:major.sourceText: Increase stats gained from Items by 12%, and damage dealt by Item Effects by 10%.

eternal:demiurge:construct.name: Demiurge / Construct
eternal:demiurge:construct.sourceText: Gain +10 Health and +1.25 Ability Haste per Level.

eternal:demiurge:cursed-corrupted.name: Demiurge / Cursed Corrupted
eternal:demiurge:cursed-corrupted.sourceText: Convert each 1% Crit Chance into 1 Ability Haste (you lose the crit stat).

eternal:marrow:major.name: Marrow (Major)
eternal:marrow:major.sourceText: Omnivamp scaling with missing health, doubled on kill.

effects.note: missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

eternal:nihil:major.name: Nihil (Major)
eternal:nihil:major.sourceText: Damage a hero to gain Doom for 3s. Doom grants 1 PP, 2 MP, 1 phys & 1 mag armor per 3s it persists; on level-up or Takedown the granted stats permanently increase by 20%.

effects.note: accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

eternal:aion:major.name: Aion (Major)
eternal:aion:major.sourceText: Mana regen stacking on cast; gold from spell damage.

effects.note: economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

eternal:exarch:major.name: Exarch (Major)
eternal:exarch:major.sourceText: Healing or Shielding a target (including yourself) grants them 10% Total Attack Speed and empowers their Basic Attacks to deal 10% bonus Magical Damage On-Hit for 4s.

effects.note: buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

eternal:lotus:major.name: Lotus (Major)
eternal:lotus:major.sourceText: Every 2 minutes and every Takedown randomly grants +1.5% Damage, +4 Ability Haste, +0.75% Move Speed, or +1.5% Max Health.
eternal:lotus:major.source: owned eternals.json (1.14 Eternals system); encoded 2026-06-12 as expected value per proc (uniform over the four stated buffs), time-driven procs only (1 per 2 minutes)

effects.note: takedown-triggered procs excluded (no takedown model) — the encoding is a floor; in real games Lotus stacks faster, especially when ahead

item:alternata.name: Alternata
item:alternata.sourceText: Alternate Reality: Your Alternate Ability deals 15% more damage. Nata Style: Upon using your Alternate Ability, reduce your other current Basic Ability Cooldowns by 12%.
item:alternata.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (audit: sim picked it on raw stats with both passives uncredited)

effects.note: Nata Style cooldown ripple (-12% of other current basic cooldowns per Alternate cast) depends on cast interleaving; not modeled

item:imperator.name: Imperator
item:imperator.sourceText: Precision: Critical Strikes deal 30% more damage.
item:imperator.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (item audit: high-play field staples had no entries)

item:prophecy.name: Prophecy
item:prophecy.sourceText: Magical Strikes: On Basic Attacks, deal 20 (+15% MP) Damage On-Hit.
item:prophecy.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (item audit: high-play field staples had no entries)

item:megacosm.name: Megacosm
item:megacosm.sourceText: Disintegrate: On ability damage, deal 2.5% of Target Max Health over 3s (reapplication refreshes). Star Killer: also 6% of Target BONUS Health over 3s vs heroes.
item:megacosm.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (item audit: high-play field staples had no entries)

effects.note: Star Killer (6% of target BONUS health) needs a base/bonus health split the reference profiles do not carry

item:overlord.name: Overlord
item:overlord.sourceText: Colossal Cleave: basic attacks cleave around the target (ratio-scaled). Devourer: permanent health stacking on kills.
item:overlord.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (item audit: high-play field staples had no entries)

effects.note: cleave is multi-target value (no single-target change at this text precision); Devourer health stacking is kill-economy

item:terminus.name: Terminus
item:terminus.sourceText: Anon: overhealing from Lifesteal converts to a Shield (max +100%).
item:terminus.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (item audit: high-play field staples had no entries)

effects.note: overheal-to-shield needs a health-state model; the 15% lifesteal line is valued by the sustain objective

item:fire-blossom.name: Fire Blossom
item:fire-blossom.sourceText: Heatwave: burn nearby enemies 15 (+0.7%) per second, ramping +6.25%/s up to +50% (Firestorm).
item:fire-blossom.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4; encoded 2026-06-12 (item audit: high-play field staples had no entries)

effects.note: proximity burn aura; uptime depends on positioning the closed-form sim cannot observe

item:plasma-blade.name: Plasma Blade / Vibro Cutter
item:plasma-blade.sourceText: Gain 4% Critical Strike Chance for 3s. Stacks up to 5 times.

item:oathkeeper.name: Oathkeeper / Celestial Spellblade
item:oathkeeper.sourceText: Empower your next Basic Attack within 4s. Deal 60 (+35%) Damage On-Hit.

item:viper.name: Viper / Corrode + Diligence
item:viper.sourceText: Reduce Physical Armor by 4.5% for 3s, stacks to 6. Deal 8% increased On-Hit and Ability damage.

item:marshal.name: Marshal / Sheriff
item:marshal.sourceText: Gain 15% Attack Speed. Deal 10 (+1 Per Level) Damage On-Hit.

item:rapture.name: Rapture / Nearsight
item:rapture.sourceText: Your Basic Attacks deal 20 (+15%) Damage On-Hit.

item:vanquisher.name: Vanquisher / Annihilate
item:vanquisher.sourceText: On taking a Hero below 5% Health: Execute them.
item:vanquisher.source: omeda items.json 1.14.4 (threshold from the effect condition field)

item:solaris.name: Solaris / Solarblade
item:solaris.sourceText: On Ability Cast: empower next basic, 45 (+35%) On-Hit, can crit, heals 65%.

item:crescelia.name: Crescelia / Moonblade
item:crescelia.sourceText: On Ability Cast: empower next basic 50 (+20%) On-Hit. Reduce non-ult cooldowns 12%.

item:augmentation.name: Augmentation / True Strike
item:augmentation.sourceText: On Ability Cast: empower next basic, +90% Base Physical Power On-Hit.

item:entropy.name: Entropy / Degradation
item:entropy.sourceText: On dealing Ability Damage: deal 3 (+3%) additional, once per 0.2s per target.

item:spectra.name: Spectra / Radiant Strikes + Prisma
item:spectra.sourceText: Basic Attacks deal 20 On-Hit. Prisma 30 (+4/level), 1x-2.5x by missing health.

item:basilisk.name: Basilisk / Corrode
item:basilisk.sourceText: On damaging a Hero: reduce Physical Armor 4.5% for 3s, stacks to 6 (Eroded).

item:soulbinder.name: Soulbinder / Arcane Salvo
item:soulbinder.sourceText: Abilities deal 7% bonus damage at 1450+ range.

item:tainted-blade.name: Tainted Blade / Blighted Strikes + Hex
item:tainted-blade.sourceText: Reduce Target Healing 45% for 3s. Blighted targets take 5% more damage.

item:azure-core.name: Azure Core / Spirit Shield
item:azure-core.sourceText: On going below 40% Health: gain a 100 (+12%) Shield for 5s.

item:malady.name: Malady / Demise + Parting Gift
item:malady.sourceText: On damaging a Hero below 40% Health: 20 (+15% PP) Damage, +4 per stack; on Killing a Unit: explode for unstated % of Max Health.

effects.note: Demise's finisher fires only on sub-40%-health targets and ramps +4 per stack at an unstated cadence; Parting Gift's on-kill explosion deals an unstated % of Max Health. A fixed-target damage-over-window sim can neither gate nor stack it.
empowered basic procs every 100 Momentum stacks; the generation rate is unstated so the cadence cannot be derived
XP-stacking item that evolves into Orb of Enlightenment — economy/progression, outside combat objectives
shields a nearby ally — team-side value outside the single-hero sim
shields an immobilized ally — team-side value outside the single-hero sim
healing-amp stacks and an on-takedown heal — sustain/economy, not single-target combat damage
out-of-combat missing-health regen — outside the in-fight window

item:elafrost.name: Elafrost / Frostblade
item:elafrost.sourceText: On Ability Cast: empower next basic (within 4s) for 70 (+2% max health) On-Hit.

item:inquisition.name: Inquisition / Psywave
item:inquisition.sourceText: On Ability Cast: 65 (+1.5% max health) area Damage.

item:mutilator.name: Mutilator / Mutilate + Devour
item:mutilator.sourceText: Basics deal 1% of target Max Health; Ability hits apply Mutilate 3x (3% Max Health, once per ability).

item:spectral-schematics.name: Spectral Schematics / Breakthrough
item:spectral-schematics.sourceText: Upon Immobilizing an Enemy: 40 (+5% target current Health) additional Damage. Modeled assuming the immobilize lands.

item:fist-of-razuul.name: Fist Of Razuul / Razuul's Might
item:fist-of-razuul.sourceText: At 4 stacks (~4s), empower next basic for (+2.5% max health) bonus, x2 vs Heroes = 5% own Max Health.

effects.note: Trauma ignores 30% of BONUS physical armor only; reference profiles do not split base vs bonus armor.
Chilling Spells is a 10% slow (CC) on ability damage.

item:tainted-trident.name: Tainted Trident / Blighted Strikes
item:tainted-trident.sourceText: On Physical Damage: reduce target Healing by 45% for 3s.

effects.note: Woundseeker adds a small ability bonus that scales with physical penetration (3 +6%-of-pen %), gated on a self-applied Blighted mark; a stat-scaled conditional amp with no clean primitive.

item:spear-of-desolation.name: Spear Of Desolation / Final Hour + Razors Edge
item:spear-of-desolation.sourceText: On casting Ultimate: +10% damage for 6s. Passive: +25 Ultimate Haste.

item:overseer.name: Overseer / Exalted
item:overseer.sourceText: Enhance Ultimate: deals 15% more damage (heal omitted).

item:earthshaker.name: Earthshaker / Battleborn
item:earthshaker.sourceText: On dealing damage: +1% Ability Damage for 3s, stacks to 10 (=10%).

item:world-breaker.name: World Breaker / Fiend + Maya
item:world-breaker.sourceText: On Magical Damage to a Hero: +2% Magical Damage 4.5s, stacks to 6 (=12%). Passive: +5% max Health as Magical Power.

item:orion.name: Orion / Hasty + Interstellar
item:orion.sourceText: Gain Attack Speed = 80% of Ability Haste from Items (sim uses total AH). On-Hit: +2% damage to target 3.5s, up to 16%.

item:aegis-of-agawar.name: Aegis Of Agawar / Bludgeon + Agawar's Protection
item:aegis-of-agawar.sourceText: Gain (+2.5% max Health) Physical Power. Gain 10% Total Physical & Magical Armor.

effects.note: Agawar's Protection doubles to 20% armor while below 40% Health; a health-state-gated defensive tier.
Razor Cleave is AoE splash around the target (multi-target), no single-target value.

item:resolution.name: Resolution / Darksteel
item:resolution.sourceText: On basics: (+2% max Mana) Damage On-Hit.

effects.note: Potent Font is a per-kill max-mana farming stack (caps at 400 then grants PP); economy.

item:cursed-scroll.name: Cursed Scroll / Curse of Pain
item:cursed-scroll.sourceText: On Basic Attack: 30 (+4% max Health) Damage to the target (self-damage ignored).

effects.note: Forbidden Art scales AS/regen with the holder missing health; no health-state uptime model.

item:citadel.name: Citadel / Intimidation
item:citadel.sourceText: Nearby Enemy Heroes have their Physical Armor decreased by 20%.

effects.note: Fortification is a defensive armor aura (+5 per nearby enemy).

item:flux-matrix.name: Flux Matrix / Unstable Shackles
item:flux-matrix.sourceText: Nearby Enemy Heroes take 10% additional Magical Damage (proximity aura; the holder own magical abilities benefit).

item:tainted-bastion.name: Tainted Bastion / Blighted Veil
item:tainted-bastion.sourceText: On taking Magical Damage: reduce the source Healing by 45% for 3s.

effects.note: Colossus is flat damage mitigation (defensive).

item:spirit-of-amir.name: Spirit Of Amir / Natural Selection
item:spirit-of-amir.sourceText: Outside the Jungle: gain 8% Magical Power.

effects.note: Jungle branch grants magical lifesteal instead, and Monster Slayer is +12% vs monsters (PvE).

item:manta-scythe.name: Manta-Scythe / Divide & Conquer
item:manta-scythe.sourceText: Against an isolated target (no ally within 1000u): deal 10% more damage. Kill-window sims are 1v1 by construction.

effects.note: Insatiable Harvest is a PvE 1.5x-to-minions + per-kill PP farming stack.

item:infernum.name: Infernum / Cinder
item:infernum.sourceText: At 4 Kindling stacks: 4% of target Max Health as Damage over 2s.

effects.note: Cinder also adds +1.5%-of-physical-power to the %max-health (stat-scaled %health) and Furnace scales with enemy bonus armor; neither is cleanly expressible.
Lesser Deconstruct executes minions/small monsters (PvE).
Oppression grants a timed +20 ability haste window after ulting (uptime-dependent) plus MS; out of scope.

item:orb-of-enlightenment.name: Orb Of Enlightenment / Enlightened
item:orb-of-enlightenment.sourceText: Per Hero Level: gain 3 Magical Power and 15 Health.

effects.note: Art of Fortitude restores 3% missing health over 3s on cast; out-of-combat-style sustain.

item:dust-devil.name: Dust Devil / Menace
item:dust-devil.sourceText: On Basic Attacking Heroes: +3% Attack Speed 3s, stacks to 5 (=15%).

effects.note: At 5 stacks grants 10% movement speed (out of scope).

item:alternator.name: Alternator / Alternate Reality
item:alternator.sourceText: Your Alternate Ability deals 15% more damage.

effects.note: Adeptus is an evolve stack (15 hits with the Alternate Ability evolves into Alternata).

item:echelon-cloak.name: Echelon Cloak / Unseen Threat
item:echelon-cloak.sourceText: While Camouflaged (and 3s after): increase damage dealt by 8%. Credited as a camo-opener burst.

effects.note: Camouflage requires standing still 2s and grants missing-HP/mana regen; only the opener burst is credited.

item:tainted-charm.name: Tainted Charm / Blighted Presence
item:tainted-charm.sourceText: While near Enemy Heroes: reduce their Healing by 45%.

effects.note: Blighted Presence also slows 12% (CC); only the anti-heal is credited.

item:tainted-totem.name: Tainted Totem / Blighted Touch
item:tainted-totem.sourceText: On dealing damage: reduce the target Healing by 45% for 3s.

effects.note: Blighted Well spreads the anti-heal to allies on heal/shield; team-side, not extra holder damage.
Tele-Blink is a mobility blink swap (out of scope).

item:absolution.name: Absolution / Bravery
item:absolution.sourceText: On being Immobilized: 25% Damage Mitigation + 40% MS for 3s.

effects.note: A defensive, CC-triggered mitigation buff; no incoming-mitigation primitive.

item:amulet-of-chaos.name: Amulet Of Chaos / Deadly Wish
item:amulet-of-chaos.sourceText: On Takedown: -65% basic ability cooldowns, restore 35% missing mana.

effects.note: Takedown-gated; a 1v1 kill-window sim has no takedown model.

item:ashbringer.name: Ashbringer / Chrono Strikes
item:ashbringer.sourceText: On basic: -8% current non-ult cooldowns On-Hit (once per ability).

effects.note: The cooldown ripple depends on ability interleaving the sim does not track.

item:astral-catalyst.name: Astral Catalyst / Ravenous + Event Horizon
item:astral-catalyst.sourceText: On Takedown: -20% ult CD. On damaging a Shielded target: +40% bonus damage.

effects.note: Takedown-gated and enemy-shield-gated; neither state exists in the sim.

item:berserkers-axe.name: Berserker's Axe / Blitz
item:berserkers-axe.sourceText: On Dashing/Leaping: empower next basic for 50 (+40%) Damage.

effects.note: The empowered-basic cadence depends on the hero mobility cooldowns, which are not modeled.

item:claw-of-hermes.name: Claw Of Hermes / Mana Burn
item:claw-of-hermes.sourceText: On basic: drain 2.5-4% target Max Mana, deal True Damage = 75% of mana drained.

effects.note: Damage scales with the target max/missing mana; target-mana-dependent, explicitly out of scope.

item:crystal-tear.name: Crystal Tear / Elation
item:crystal-tear.sourceText: On Healing or Shielding Heroes: both gain 30 MP + 15 AH for 5s.

effects.note: A support, team-side buff on heal/shield cast.

item:crystalline-cuirass.name: Crystalline Cuirass / Celestite
item:crystalline-cuirass.sourceText: On taking Magical Damage: +5 Magical Armor per stack (to 5).

effects.note: A defensive stack gained from incoming magical damage.

item:dawnstar.name: Dawnstar / Debilitating Strikes
item:dawnstar.sourceText: On basics: reduce target damage dealt 2.5% (to 5 stacks).

effects.note: A defensive enemy-damage debuff; the AS rider is immobilize-gated team utility.

item:demon-edge.name: Demon Edge / Demonic
item:demon-edge.sourceText: On damaging a Shielded target: +20% MS and +45% bonus damage.

effects.note: Requires the enemy to be Shielded; no enemy-shield state in the sim.

item:devotion.name: Devotion / Fidelity + Mystica
item:devotion.sourceText: Heals/Shields 10% stronger on sub-40% allies; reduce large incoming magical hits 15%.

effects.note: Both are support/defensive (team-side heal boost, incoming-magical mitigation).

item:dread.name: Dread / Vital Shield
item:dread.sourceText: On receiving Hero Magical Damage: block 25% of Magical Damage for 3s.

effects.note: A defensive, incoming-damage effect with no offensive component.

item:dreambinder.name: Dreambinder / Chilling Spells
item:dreambinder.sourceText: On ability damage: Slow 25% for 1s; does not apply with proc damage.

effects.note: A slow only (CC).

item:envy.name: Envy / Sacrificial Strike
item:envy.sourceText: On Dash/Leap/Camo-exit: next basic crits; Hush silences for 0.8s.

effects.note: The guaranteed-crit cadence depends on mobility uptime; Hush is a silence (CC).

item:everbloom.name: Everbloom / Divine Protection
item:everbloom.sourceText: On Healing/Shielding an ally: grant 5% mitigation + 20 Tenacity.

effects.note: A support, team-side defensive grant.

item:frosted-lure.name: Frosted Lure / Frostwave
item:frosted-lure.sourceText: Near enemies 4s: 50 (+4%) AoE Damage + slow + self-shield.

effects.note: A proximity AoE nuke (multi-target) with an ambiguous scaling stat and a self-shield.

item:frostguard.name: Frostguard / Stifle
item:frostguard.sourceText: On being basic-attacked: reduce the source Attack Speed 3.5% (to 5 stacks).

effects.note: A defensive, incoming-basic-gated debuff.

item:gaia-greaves.name: Gaia Greaves / Tremor
item:gaia-greaves.sourceText: Move to build up to 100 stacks; basics expend them for up to 40 (+60%)(+5%) Damage.

effects.note: The bonus-damage cadence is movement-stack-dependent and unstated.

item:galaxy-greaves.name: Galaxy Greaves / ZeroG + Celerity
item:galaxy-greaves.sourceText: Jump-height stacks while moving; +7% MS out of combat.

effects.note: Movement and out-of-combat MS utility; no combat damage component.

item:gaussian-greaves.name: Gaussian Greaves / System Shock
item:gaussian-greaves.sourceText: Double-jump, then a landing shockwave for 100 (+50%) Damage + slow.

effects.note: A mobility-gated AoE, not a sustained combat proc.

item:giants-ring.name: Giants Ring / Retribution + Gigantism
item:giants-ring.sourceText: On being basic-attacked: -0.25s non-ult CDs; on Ultimate: size + 5% mitigation.

effects.note: Cooldown refunds and a defensive ult buff gated on being attacked.

item:golems-gift.name: Golems Gift / Stone Skin
item:golems-gift.sourceText: Out of combat: 5 stacks of 4 MP + 4 Physical Armor; lost on taking physical hits.

effects.note: Stacks build out of combat and deplete in a fight; net in-fight uptime is indeterminate.

item:hexbound-bracers.name: Hexbound Bracers / Mana Reactor
item:hexbound-bracers.sourceText: Restore mana = 15% of damage taken; take 5 (+1/level) less basic damage.

effects.note: Mana sustain and basic-attack mitigation; defensive/economy.

item:legacy.name: Legacy / Tenacious Bravery
item:legacy.sourceText: On going below 40% Health: self-cleanse + 3s CC immunity.

effects.note: A defensive, health-state-gated cleanse/immunity.

item:lifebinder.name: Lifebinder / Twilight Sonata
item:lifebinder.sourceText: Per 10% missing health: +2.5 MP and +1% Magical Lifesteal.

effects.note: Scales with the holder missing health; no health-state uptime model.

item:lifecore.name: Lifecore / Healing Wisp
item:lifecore.sourceText: At 100 charges: fire a heal at the lowest-health ally for 100 (+40%).

effects.note: A team-side ally heal, not the holder damage.

item:lunaria.name: Lunaria / Mending
item:lunaria.sourceText: On Healing/Shielding an ally: consume damage charges to heal them.

effects.note: A support, team-side heal-conversion.

item:luxforge-lantern.name: Luxforge Lantern / Lumos
item:luxforge-lantern.sourceText: On Takedown/Ward-kill: permanent +1 Physical Power (to 30 stacks).

effects.note: A permanent economy/farming stack.

item:mesmer.name: Mesmer / Vengeful Shroud
item:mesmer.sourceText: Gain a Spell Shield that blocks the next ability.

effects.note: A defensive spell shield; carries no damage effect.

item:mistmeadow-buckler.name: Mistmeadow Buckler / Bark Skin
item:mistmeadow-buckler.sourceText: Consume charges to block magical damage (up to 50% of a hit).

effects.note: Defensive, incoming-magical mitigation from a regenerating charge pool.

item:nightfall.name: Nightfall / Eclipse + Dusk Reaver
item:nightfall.sourceText: Abilities heal 6% of damage dealt; on Takedown: a 200-400 shield.

effects.note: Ability sustain (no damage component) and a takedown-gated shield.

item:omen.name: Omen / Bestial Momentum
item:omen.sourceText: At 100 Momentum: empower a basic for 30 (+20%) + -25% non-ult CDs.

effects.note: The Momentum stack cadence (movement + attacks) is unstated.
Takedown-gated; no takedown model in a 1v1 kill window.

item:rebirth.name: Rebirth / Mechanica
item:rebirth.sourceText: Upon dying, return as a Drone and possibly resurrect.

effects.note: A death-revive mechanic; out of any damage/EHP model.

item:ruination.name: Ruination / Spirit Bleed
item:ruination.sourceText: On-hit bleed drains 30 (+8% target Max Mana); True Damage = 80% of mana drained.

effects.note: Damage scales with the target max mana; target-mana-dependent, out of scope.

item:salvation.name: Salvation / Aegis
item:salvation.sourceText: On going below 30% Health: a (+22%) shield + 10% omnivamp for 6s.

effects.note: A defensive, health-state-gated shield/sustain.

item:solstice.name: Solstice / Mornfall
item:solstice.sourceText: Consume Pendulum stacks on basic for 10 (+0-55%) Damage, 2x at max.

effects.note: Stack-consume cadence and the scaling base are unstated/ambiguous.

item:spellbreaker.name: Spellbreaker / Malefic
item:spellbreaker.sourceText: While the Veil spell-shield is active: +15% Magical Power.

effects.note: The +15% holds only until the Veil blocks an ability and breaks; in-fight uptime is indeterminate.
Flat physical-damage mitigation; defensive, and no mitigation primitive exists.

item:syonic-echo.name: Syonic Echo / Duplicity
item:syonic-echo.sourceText: On cast: next 3 basics gain 30% Total Attack Speed (3s).

effects.note: A windowed 3-basic AS burst with no clean primitive (Close Combat reset is melee-only).

item:transference.name: Transference / Shield Transference
item:transference.sourceText: Expiring shields restore 50% of remaining value as Health; +MS/armor while shielded.

effects.note: Defensive, shield-state-gated.

item:unbroken-will.name: Unbroken Will / Undying
item:unbroken-will.sourceText: On being Immobilized: +25% Physical & Magical Armor for 2.5s.

effects.note: A defensive, CC-triggered armor buff.

item:vainglory.name: Vainglory / Vanity
item:vainglory.sourceText: On dealing/taking damage: +0.5% Armors per stack (to 10), +10% at max.

effects.note: A defensive ramping armor stat.

item:vanguardian.name: Vanguardian / Guardian
item:vanguardian.sourceText: Nearby allies gain 15 Physical + 12 Magical Armor.

effects.note: A team-side defensive aura.

item:void-conduit.name: Void Conduit / Relativity
item:void-conduit.sourceText: Near an ally: both gain 6% Omnivamp + 1% missing-mana regen/s.

effects.note: A team-side sustain aura.
A healing-received amp (sustain); not a damage or EHP primitive.

item:volcanica.name: Volcanica / Hellstorm
item:volcanica.sourceText: On cast: -0.5s other basic-ability CDs (1.5s on Ultimate).

effects.note: The cooldown ripple depends on ability interleaving the sim does not track.

item:vyzar-carapace.name: Vyzar Carapace / Shell Smash
item:vyzar-carapace.sourceText: At 3 Scorn stacks: 60-170 (by level) Damage + a 50 (+12%) shield.

effects.note: The proc damage type is ambiguous and it grants a self-shield; a clean credit is unsafe.

item:wardens-faith.name: Warden's Faith / Stalwart + Mocking Presence
item:wardens-faith.sourceText: Take 20% less crit damage; nearby enemies -8% Physical Power.

effects.note: Both are defensive/debuff (crit mitigation, enemy-power reduction); no offensive primitive.

item:windcaller.name: Windcaller / Zephyr
item:windcaller.sourceText: On Healing/Shielding an ally: both gain 8% MS for 1.5s.

effects.note: A team-side movement utility.

item:onixian-quiver.name: Onixian Quiver / Multishot + Onixia
item:onixian-quiver.sourceText: Fire 2 extra projectiles (8-30% by range); melee only: +25% crit chance.

effects.note: Multishot is multi-projectile/splash and Onixia is melee-only; crediting it globally would overvalue ranged carries.

item:cursed-ring.name: Cursed Ring / Curse of Swiftness
item:cursed-ring.sourceText: Total Attack Speed x1.2, but Basic Attacks deal 25% less damage; AS cap 3->4.

effects.note: The +20% AS is inseparable from a basics-only -25% damage penalty and a cap change the sim cannot express; crediting the upside alone would overvalue it.

item:catalytic-drive.name: Catalytic Drive / Deconstruct + Converter
item:catalytic-drive.sourceText: Next basic executes minions/small monsters (+gold); evolve after 20 executes.

effects.note: PvE execute and an evolve trigger; no combat-damage component.
